expected_main_lane_changes: Add one local UPM package reference to Packages/manifest.json.
Add quarantine showcase placements to Assets/_Project/Editor/V0SceneBuilder.cs after import validation passes.
Add per-level WMS04 required showcase names to Assets/_Project/Editor/V0LevelValidator.cs.
Rebuild generated scenes through Unity only after the import gate is green.
top_actionable_recommendations: Import WeaponMechanismsSet04 as a visual-only quarantine package, not as gameplay weapons.

Use representative validator coverage across coils, gauges, grips, receiver plates, muzzle crowns, pressure tanks, valves, ammo cylinders, scattergun chambers, rails, gloved-hand silhouettes, materials, and meshes.
Block scene work until the package resolves and Unity compiles cleanly.

Add prefab safety checks for no colliders, no rigidbodies, no audio authority, no gameplay scripts, no weapon configs, no projectile spawners, no damage scripts, and no viewmodel animation controllers.
Treat muzzle crowns, ammo cylinders, rails, coils, and gloved hands as future promotion risks requiring a separate viewmodel and gameplay authority pass.
Require at least two WMS04 quarantine showcase objects per level only after visual placement is finalized.
Preserve rollback as package-reference removal plus validator/showcase cleanup, not package-root deletion.
Run Unity lookdev only; do not use Blender for this intake.
